scripts.build:android: tsc && vite build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src='dist';const dest='src-tauri/gen/android/app/src/main/assets';function copyDir(s,d){if(!fs.existsSync(d))fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(s).forEach(f=>{const sp=path.join(s,f),dp=path.join(d,f);fs.statSync(sp).isDirectory()?copyDir(sp,dp):fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp)})};copyDir(src,dest);console.log('Copied dist to Android assets')"
scripts.tauri:build:win: npm run build && tauri build --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.tauri:build:android: npm run build:android && tauri android build --apk
